profile.name: Diwan Purnama
profile.title: Fullstack Developer
profile.bio: I build high-performance, scalable web applications with clean architecture — from backend APIs to polished frontend interfaces.
profile.about: I'm a Fullstack Developer with 2+ years of experience building enterprise-grade web applications. Proficient across JavaScript (Next.js, React), PHP (Laravel), and C# (.NET Core/ASP.NET) ecosystems. I deliver clean, testable code backed by solid database design (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and DevOps fundamentals (Docker, CI/CD). Currently working on RFID-based warehouse systems and government asset management platforms. I thrive in agile teams with Git, Jira, and SonarQube-driven quality gates.

experience.title: Programmer
highlights: Architected and developed a full-stack RFID-based Warehouse Management System (WMS) using Next.js, delivering real-time inventory tracking and RFID tag integration.
Engineered RESTful APIs for WMS RFID lifecycle (registration, scan, tag-matching, reporting) with PostgreSQL.
Built an Asset Management System (budgeting module) with ASP.NET MVC and optimized backend APIs in .NET Core.
Enforced code quality standards through white-box testing with SonarQube and E2E tests with Cypress.
Containerized development environments with Docker and managed sprints via Jira/Scrum.

experience.title: Backend Developer (Freelance)
highlights: Resolved critical backend bugs for Yayasan Sekar Telkom web platform (Laravel + MySQL).
Authored comprehensive REST API documentation to streamline frontend-backend integration.
Delivered frontend support (Vue.js) for Yayasan Sekar Telkom feature rollout.

experience.title: Frontend Developer (Internship)
highlights: Developed a telecommunication device testing web app for PT Telkom using Laravel + Bootstrap.
Implemented email-based OTP verification, strengthening system authentication security.
Built Pre-Function Test Technical Meeting module and device functionality testing features.

projects.name: Diarvis — Regional Asset Management
description: Designed and developed a comprehensive regional asset management web application for Bandung Regency using Laravel.
Built full CRUD workflows for master asset data: create, read, update, delete, and detailed views.
Integrated PostgreSQL for robust relational data modeling of government asset hierarchies.

projects.name: Telkom Test House
description: Built a web application supporting telecommunication device certification testing workflows at PT Telkom.
Engineered an email-based OTP verification system for secure test-result access.
Developed functional testing and Technical Meeting Pre-Functional Test modules.

projects.name: PLN Successor
description: Developed a job promotion management system for PT PLN's internal HR processes using Laravel.
Designed normalized PostgreSQL database schema for promotion tracking and approval workflows.
Documented REST API specifications enabling smooth handoff between frontend and backend teams.

projects.name: Metagama Information System
projects.description: A web-based administrative system for Metagama's religious mentoring program at POLBAN. Built to digitize participant and group data management — replacing paper-based records with structured CRUD operations. Manages participant registration, group assignments, attendance tracking, and reporting for hundreds of students across multiple mentoring cycles.
